title: Big Globe - Antique Trading Ship
description: Antique Trading Ship Compatibility so that it is naturally generated in Big Globe
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-antique-trading-ship)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [Antique Trading Ship](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-trading-ship), Makes the structure correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))
